questions.original_question: Can you contractually guarantee a 15-minute RTO for every single-tenant and customer-managed deployment?
questions.generated_answer: No. You cannot contractually guarantee a 15-minute RTO for every single-tenant and customer-managed deployment. The managed production service explicitly documents a recovery time objective of 4 hours (and a 15-minute RPO), and the managed service availability target is 99.9% monthly subject to the contracted service definition. Customer-managed (single-tenant) deployment is not the default delivery model and requires separate scoping through professional services. (The provided references do not state whether a separately scoped professional-services engagement for a customer-managed or single-tenant deployment could be contracted to deliver a 15-minute RTO, so that possibility is not supported by these documents.)

risk.reason: Answer is directly grounded in the cited references and avoids extrapolating about scoped professional-services outcomes or unsupported contractual promises.
